lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Hello. Let's get to business. I got scissors. You got hair. Want to do this?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a haircut please.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Awesome! There are so many hair styles to pick from. What would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like a shave please.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Sweet! There are so many facial hair styles to pick from. What would you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'd like to ask you about something else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Does this aggressive business model always work?

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: 9 times out of 10. Though I wouldn't call it aggressive... I just like cutting straight to the point.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Speaking of straight to the point. What can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: My name is Emma. I LOVE hair! There are so many cool things you can do with it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose there are. Have you always been a hairdresser?

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: No, I used to be a sheep shearer. However, the farmer wasn't too happy when I dyed his favourite sheep pink and gave it a side-cut.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Anyway, enough chit-chat. What can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is that girl over there?

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: That's Suzie, my sister. She's a bit shy around strangers, but a lovely person! I just wish more people would see that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Doesn't she talk to anyone?

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Only to me. She wants to, it's just... difficult.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: She likes being around the shop. My hope is that when more customers come in, she'll gradually get used to strangers and open up a bit more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's sweet of you to help her like that.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Thank you. Now... What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, nevermind.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Suit yourself. Come back if you'd like a trim!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thank you.

lines.speaker: Emma
lines.text: Suit yourself. Come back if you change your mind!
